data.title: Precigen Inc expected to post a loss of 8 cents a share - Earnings Preview
data.description:
• Precigen Inc is expected to show a fall in quarterly revenue when it reports results on May 12 (estimated) for the period ending March 31 2025

  • The Germantown Maryland-based company is expected to report a 53.1% decrease in revenue to $500 thousand from $1.07 million a year ago, according to the mean estimate from 2 analysts, based on LSEG data.

  • ​LSEG's mean analyst estimate for Precigen Inc is for a loss of 8 cents per share.

  • The current average analyst rating on the shares is "buy" and the breakdown of recommendations is 3 "strong buy" or "buy," no "hold" and 1 "sell" or "strong sell."

  • The mean earnings estimate of analysts had risen by about 8.7% in the last three months. ​

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for Precigen Inc is $6.00​, above​ its last closing price of $1.35. ​​​

data.title: RingCentral Is Maintained at Neutral by UBS
DT Midstream Files 8K - Changes To Articles >DTM
data.description:
DT Midstream Inc. (DTM) filed a Form 8K - Changes to Articles of Incorporation or Bylaws; Change in Fiscal Year - with the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission on May 09, 2025.

On May 6, 2025, the stockholders of DT Midstream, Inc. (the "Company") voted at the virtual 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders (the "Annual Meeting") to approve a proposal to amend the Company's Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation (the "Certificate of Incorporation") to eliminate the prohibition on the ability of the Company's stockholders to call a special meeting of stockholders, and, in accordance with certain amendments to the Company's Amended and Restated Bylaws, grant stockholders owning for a minimum of one full year not less than 25% of the voting power of all outstanding shares of the Company's common stock the ability to request a special meeting of stockholders (the "Stockholder Rights Proposal"). The Stockholder Rights Proposal became effective with the filing of the Certificate of Amendment to the Certificate of Incorporation (the "Certificate of Amendment") with the Secretary of State of Delaware on May 9, 2025.

A copy of the Certificate of Amendment is attached as Exhibit 3.1 to this Current Report on Form 8-K and is incorporated herein by reference.

The full text of this SEC filing can be retrieved at: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1842022/000094787125000484/ss4809543_8k.htm

Any exhibits and associated documents for this SEC filing can be retrieved at: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1842022/000094787125000484/0000947871-25-000484-index.htm

Public companies must file a Form 8-K, or current report, with the SEC generally within four days of any event that could materially affect a company's financial position or the value of its shares.

data.title: Portman Ridge Finance Corporation Q1 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Portman Ridge Finance Corporation has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025, providing insights into its performance and strategic initiatives. The company reported a net investment income of $0.47 per share and a net asset value of $18.85 per share. The deployment of approximately $17.5 million and sales and repayments of approximately $15.7 million resulted in a net deployment of approximately $1.8 million. Additionally, the company announced a second-quarter 2025 quarterly base distribution of $0.47 per share.

Financial Highlights

For the first quarter of 2025, Portman Ridge reported total investment income of $12.1 million, a decrease from $14.4 million in the fourth quarter of 2024. This decline was primarily due to the reversal of previously accrued income after a portfolio company was placed on non-accrual status. Core investment income, excluding the impact of purchase price accounting, was also $12.1 million, compared to $14.4 million in the previous quarter.

Net investment income (NII) for the first quarter was $4.3 million ($0.47 per share), inclusive of the reversal of $0.4 million ($0.05 per share) of previously accrued interest income on a loan placed on non-accrual. This compares to $5.5 million ($0.60 per share) in the fourth quarter of 2024. The net asset value (NAV) as of March 31, 2025, was $173.5 million ($18.85 per share), down from $178.5 million ($19.41 per share) as of December 31, 2024.

Business and Operational Highlights

During the first quarter, Portman Ridge deployed approximately $17.5 million into strong, defensively positioned portfolio companies. Concurrently, the company had $15.7 million in repayments and sales, resulting in a net deployment of approximately $1.8 million. The investment portfolio at fair value as of March 31, 2025, was $406.4 million, comprised of 93 different portfolio companies. The debt investment portfolio, excluding investments in CLO Funds, equities, and Joint Ventures, totaled $324.8 million at fair value, spread across 24 different industries and 72 portfolio companies.

Strategic Initiatives and Corporate Developments

Portman Ridge declared a regular quarterly base distribution of $0.47 per share of common stock, payable on May 29, 2025, to stockholders of record at the close of business on May 19, 2025. The company also encouraged investors to vote in favor of the acquisition of Logan Ridge Finance Corporation, highlighting the potential benefits of increased scale, improved liquidity, and greater operational efficiency.

Management's Perspective

Ted Goldthorpe, Chief Executive Officer of Portman Ridge, emphasized the company's disciplined investment strategy and prudent risk management in the face of a challenging macroeconomic backdrop. He expressed confidence in the company's ability to drive long-term shareholder value through thoughtful deployment and rigorous underwriting. Goldthorpe also highlighted the strategic benefits of the proposed merger with Logan Ridge, urging shareholders to support the merger.

Future Outlook

Looking ahead, Portman Ridge remains focused on disciplined credit selection and prudent risk management. The company views the current market dynamics as an opportunity to differentiate through strategic deployment and underwriting. The proposed merger with Logan Ridge is expected to enhance long-term shareholder value by providing increased scale, improved liquidity, and greater operational efficiency.

SEC Filing: Portman Ridge Finance Corp [ PTMN ] - 8-K - May. 09, 2025

data.title: Democratic state attorneys general sue to block Trump's energy emergency
data.description:
Fifteen state attorneys general sued U.S. President Donald Trump on Friday to try to block his national energy emergency, which the states said is an unlawful effort to disregard regulations and fast-track permitting for oil and gas development.

The Democratic state attorneys general, including those from California, Washington and New York, said using emergency powers to bypass normal permitting processes for hundreds of proposed projects will cause irreparable harm to natural and historic resources, undermining drinking water and wildlife habitat.

The lawsuit, filed in Seattle federal court, seeks a court order that the January 20 executive order declaring a national emergency was unlawful and that efforts to implement the order by Army Corps of Engineers and Advisory Council on Historic Preservation (ACHP) violated administrative law.

It also seeks an injunction barring the Army Corps and ACHP from emergency procedures to issue permits for energy-related projects.

The White House said in a statement that the "President of the United States has the authority to determine what is a national emergency, not state attorneys or the courts. President Trump recognizes that unleashing American energy is crucial to both our economic and national security.”

Trump, a Republican, declared a national energy emergency on his first day in office, claiming the development and production of energy and critical minerals failed to meet the country's needs. Trump directed the leadership of government agencies to use emergency powers to speed up permitting and remove obstacles to energy production.

U.S. energy production is near record levels, although U.S. power demand is growing for the first time in decades due to the development and adoption of AI. The price of crude oil <CLc1> has fallen around 20% from a year ago and nearly 50% from a recent peak in 2022.

Emergency powers allow presidents to tap into special authorities, which is often used in times of crisis. Trump declared a national emergency during his first term to fight the COVID-19 pandemic.

Since he took office in January, Trump has declared illegal immigration a national emergency to speed up construction of detention space and a wall on the southern border with Mexico. His use of a national emergency to impose trade tariffs was nearly terminated by a bipartisan vote in the Senate.

data.title: US Treasury secretary urges Congress to raise debt limit by mid-July
data.description:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on Friday urged Congress to raise the federal government's debt limit by mid-July to avoid a default that would upend global markets.

Bessent told congressional leaders that there is a "reasonable probability" that the federal government would run short of cash to cover its obligations in August, when Congress is due to be out of town.

"Therefore I respectfully urge Congress to increase or suspend the debt limit by mid-July, before its scheduled break, to protect the full faith and credit of the United States," Bessent wrote in a letter.

data.title: Discount on Western Canada Select heavy crude unchanged
data.description:
The discount on Western Canada Select (WCS) to the North American benchmark West Texas Intermediate futures (WTI) was unchanged on Friday.

WCS for June delivery in Hardisty, Alberta, settled at $9.10 a barrel under the U.S. benchmark WTI, according to brokerage CalRock.

* Canadian heavy crude has been trading at a tight discount in recent months in part due to the opening of the Trans Mountain pipeline expansion one year ago, which boosted the country's oil export capacity.

* Canadian crude has also benefited from U.S. sanctions on Venezuela and other countries, which is boosting demand for non-sanctioned heavy crude producers.

* Canadian heavy crude producers also tend to see tighter differentials when global oil prices are lower, in part because it means less competition for pipeline space.

* Globally, oil prices settled nearly 2% higher on Friday and notched their first weekly gains since mid-April as a U.S. trade deal with the United Kingdom turned investors optimistic ahead of talks between top officials from Washington and Beijing.

data.title: Energy Up as Oil Demand Worries Fade — Energy Roundup
data.description:
Shares of energy companies rose as prospects of a major slowdown in oil demand faded.

Activist investment firm Elliott Investment Management entered talks to buy a stake in a package of infrastructure assets, including a pipeline that carries Russian natural gas to Europe.

Natural-gas futures rose for the second straight week, with traders looking beyond recent storage builds to higher summertime demand.

Write to Rob Curran at rob.curran@dowjones.com

data.title: Consumer Cos Up on Tariff Relief Hopes — Consumer Roundup
data.description:
Consumer companies rose amid optimism about U.S.-China trade talks.

Peloton Interactive fell after the maker of digitally connected exercise machinery slashed its advertising and marketing costs for a fourth consecutive quarter as part of its plan to acquire new members at a lower cost.

Write to Rob Curran at rob.curran@dowjones.com

data.title: Pakistan Army's spokesman claims India fired ballistic missiles that fell into Indian territory
data.description:
The Pakistan Army spokesman claimed India fired ballistic missiles that fell in Indian territory, announcing it in a sudden statement on national broadcaster at 1:50 a.m. local time on Saturday (2050 GMT), with no details provided to support the claim.

"I want to give you the shocking news that India fired six ballistic missiles from Adampur. One of the ballistic missiles hit in Adampur, the rest of the five missiles hit in Indian Punjab area of Amritsar," the Army's spokesman said in his short video statement.

Amritsar's district commissioner in a text message between Friday and Saturday said: "Don't panic. Siren is sounding as we are under red alert. Do not panic, as before, keep lights off, move away from windows. We will inform you when ready to resume power supply."

data.title: FEMTO Receives Nasdaq Delisting Determination and Plans to Appeal
data.description:
(TheNewswire)

May 9, 2025      –TheNewswire -      Femto
Technologies Inc. , a
pioneering Femtech company formerly known asBYND Cannasoft Enterprises Inc., announced today that it has receivedon May 8, 2025 a notification letter from TheNasdaq Stock Market LLC (“Nasdaq”), stating that based on itsreview of the Company’s recent private placement transaction thatwas completed on February 26, 2025 (the “Placement”), Nasdaq hasdetermined to delist the Company’s securities pursuant to itsdiscretionary authority under Listing Rule 5101.

As set forth in its letter, Nasdaq’s staff (the“Staff”) determined that the Company’s issuance of large numbersof shares upon the cashless exercise and “alternative exercise” ofthe Warrants issued in the Placement resulted in significant dilutionof existing shareholders thereby triggering the Staff’sdetermination.

The Company intends to appeal Staff’s determinationto a Hearings Panel (the “Panel”), pursuant to the procedures setforth in the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5800 Series. A hearing request willstay the suspension of the Company’s securities pending thePanel’s decision.

About Femto Technologies Inc.


Femto Technologies Inc. is a cutting-edge Femtech
company spearheading transformative advancements in wellness
technology. With a strong emphasis on AI-driven solutions, Femto is
dedicated to innovating products that enhance well-being through
intelligent technology integration.

ABOUT SENSERA

Sensera is a feminine wellness device on a mission tobridge the gap between feminine pleasure and wellness, providing aholistic self-care experience that adapts to a woman’s changingneeds. Sensera utilizes Femto’s proprietary Smart Release System(SRS) technology, including machine learning and AI, to enhancefeminine wellness. Sensera is a CES Innovation Awards® 2025 Honoraryin the AI category.

For more information on Sensera, please visit www.senserawellness.com and followus on Instagram,Facebook, andYouTube.

COMPANY CONTACT

Gabi Kabazo

Chief Financial Officer

Tel: (604) 833-6820

e‐mail: ir@femtocorp.com

Cautionary NoteRegarding Forward-Looking Statements

This press release includes certain statements that maybe deemed “forward-looking statements” within the meaning ofSection 27A of the U.S. Securities Act of 1933, as amended, andSection 21E of the U.S. Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amendedand under Canadian securities laws. When used in this press release,the words “may”, “would”, “could”, “will”,“intend”, “plan”, “anticipate”, “believe”,“estimate”, “expect” and similar expressions are intended toidentify forward‐looking statements. Such statements are subject tocertain risks and uncertainties, and actual circumstances, events orresults may differ materially from those projected in suchforward-looking statements.

Although the Company believes the expectationsexpressed in such forward-looking statements are based on reasonableassumptions, such statements are not guarantees of future performance,and actual events or developments may differ materially from those inforward-looking statements. Such forward-looking statementsnecessarily involve known and unknown risks and uncertainties, whichmay cause the Company’s actual performance and financial results infuture periods to differ materially from any projections of futureperformance or results expressed or implied by such forward-lookingstatements. Such statements reflect the Company's current views withrespect to future events and are subject to such risks anduncertainties. Many factors could cause actual results to differmaterially from the statements made, including future financialperformance, unanticipated regulatory requests and delays, finalpatents approval, and those factors discussed in filings made by thecompany with the Canadian securities regulatory authorities, including(without limitation) in the company's management's discussion andanalysis for the year ended December 31, 2024 and annual informationform dated March 31, 2025, which are available under the company'sprofile at www.sedarplus.ca, and in the Company’s Annual Report onForm 20-F for the year then ended that was filed with the U.S.Securities and Exchange Commission on March 31, 2025. data.title: FS Bancorp, Inc. SEC 10-Q Report
data.description:
FS Bancorp, Inc., a financial services holding company operating primarily in the greater Puget Sound area, the Kennewick-Pasco-Richland metropolitan area of Washington, and parts of Oregon, has released its Form 10-Q report for the third quarter. The report provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance and operational highlights, reflecting its strategic focus on commercial and consumer banking, as well as home lending.

Financial Highlights

  • Total Interest and Dividend Income: $46.8 million, reflecting an increase from $44.9 million in the prior year period.
  • Total Interest Expense: $15.8 million, up from $14.5 million, driven by higher borrowing costs.
  • Net Interest Income: $31.0 million, showing a slight increase from $30.3 million, indicating stable interest margins.
  • Net Income: $8.0 million, a decrease from $8.4 million, impacted by higher noninterest expenses.
  • Basic Earnings Per Share: $1.02, compared to $1.07 in the previous year, reflecting the decrease in net income.
  • Diluted Earnings Per Share: $1.01, down from $1.06, consistent with the decline in net income.

Business Highlights

  • Segment Performance: FS Bancorp operates in two primary business segments: commercial and consumer banking, and home lending. The commercial and consumer banking segment focuses on providing loan and deposit services to small- and middle-market businesses and individuals, while the home lending segment is involved in originating and servicing residential mortgage loans.
  • Geographical Performance: The company operates primarily in the greater Puget Sound area, the Kennewick-Pasco-Richland metropolitan area of Washington, and parts of Oregon. The bank's presence in these regions allows it to cater to local economic conditions and customer needs, which may affect borrowers' ability to meet repayment terms.
  • Loan Portfolio Composition: The loan portfolio is diversified across commercial real estate, residential real estate, consumer loans, and commercial business loans. Notably, the company has a significant portion of its loans in commercial real estate and residential real estate, reflecting its focus on these sectors.
  • Consumer Loan Focus: The company originates indirect home improvement loans, including solar-related projects, through a network of contractors and dealers across multiple states, indicating a strategic focus on energy-efficient home improvements.
  • Operational Strategy: FS Bancorp's strategy includes maintaining a strong presence in its core markets while expanding its loan offerings through indirect channels. This approach is designed to leverage local market knowledge and relationships while diversifying its loan portfolio.
  • Future Outlook: Management anticipates continued growth in its core markets and plans to focus on expanding its loan portfolio, particularly in the areas of commercial real estate and consumer loans. The company is also evaluating the impact of recent accounting pronouncements on its financial statements and related disclosures.

SEC Filing: FS Bancorp, Inc. [ FSBW ] - 10-Q - May. 09, 2025

data.title: Essent Group Ltd. SEC 10-Q Report
data.description:
Essent Group Ltd., a leading provider of private mortgage insurance and reinsurance for U.S. residential properties, has released its Form 10-Q report for the first quarter of 2025. The report provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance and operational highlights, reflecting its strategic initiatives and market conditions.

Financial Highlights

Total Revenues: $317.6 million, reflecting an increase from $298.4 million in the prior year period, driven by higher net investment income and other income.

Net Income: $175.4 million, a slight decrease from $181.7 million in the prior year period, impacted by higher provision for losses and LAE.

Basic EPS: $1.71, compared to $1.72 in the prior year period, indicating stable earnings per share despite a slight decrease in net income.

Diluted EPS: $1.69, compared to $1.70 in the prior year period, reflecting a consistent performance in earnings per share on a diluted basis.

Business Highlights

Revenue Segments: Essent Group's Mortgage Insurance segment generated new insurance written (NIW) of approximately $9.9 billion for the three months ended March 31, 2025, compared to $8.3 billion for the same period in 2024. This segment includes private mortgage insurance and reinsurance for U.S. residential properties.

Geographical Performance: The company's mortgage insurance operations are licensed to write coverage in all 50 states and the District of Columbia, with Essent Guaranty being approved by Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac. The title insurance operations are headquartered in Radnor, Pennsylvania, with additional locations in Charlotte, North Carolina, Columbia, Missouri, and Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

Sales Units: Essent Re, the Bermuda-based subsidiary, provided insurance or reinsurance covering approximately $2.2 billion of risk as of March 31, 2025. This includes participation in the GSE credit risk transfer market.

New Product Launches: The company expanded its offerings to include title insurance products and settlement services following the acquisition of Agents National Title Insurance Company and Boston National Title in 2023.

Current Developments: The Federal Reserve's reduction of the target federal funds rate by 100 basis points since September 2024 has impacted mortgage interest rates, which remain elevated. This has led to reduced home buying and refinancing activity, affecting mortgage originations and title insurance transactions.

Future Outlook: The company anticipates that the ultimate number of hurricane-related defaults resulting in claims will be less than non-hurricane-related defaults, with future reserve impacts dependent on the performance of these defaults. Additionally, the introduction of Bermuda's Corporate Income Tax Act 2023, effective January 1, 2025, will impose a 15% corporate income tax on in-scope entities, with Essent evaluating transitional provisions and exemptions.

SEC Filing: Essent Group Ltd. [ ESNT ] - 10-Q - May. 09, 2025

data.title: BayCom Corp SEC 10-Q Report
data.description:
BayCom Corp, a prominent player in the banking sector, has released its Form 10-Q report for the first quarter of 2025. The report provides a detailed overview of the company's financial performance and operational highlights, reflecting its ongoing efforts to serve local small and mid-sized businesses, service professionals, and individuals through its extensive network of banking branches.

Financial Highlights

  • Total Interest and Dividend Income: $32.6 million, reflecting an increase from $31.7 million in the prior year, driven by higher interest income from loans and investment securities.
  • Total Interest Expense: $9.8 million, up from $9.3 million in the previous year, primarily due to increased interest on deposits.
  • Net Interest Income: $22.9 million, compared to $22.4 million in the prior year, indicating stable interest margins.
  • Provision for Credit Losses: $0.6 million, an increase from $0.3 million in the previous year, reflecting adjustments for potential loan losses.
  • Net Interest Income After Provision for Credit Losses: $22.2 million, slightly up from $22.2 million in the previous year, showing resilience in net interest income despite higher provisions.
  • Total Noninterest Income: $1.4 million, down from $2.1 million in the previous year, impacted by a loss on equity securities.
  • Total Noninterest Expense: $16.0 million, a slight decrease from $16.1 million in the previous year, indicating effective cost management.
  • Income Before Provision for Income Taxes: $7.7 million, down from $8.1 million in the previous year, due to lower noninterest income.
  • Provision for Income Taxes: $2.0 million, compared to $2.3 million in the previous year, reflecting changes in taxable income.
  • Net Income: $5.7 million, a slight decrease from $5.9 million in the previous year, primarily due to lower noninterest income.
  • Basic Earnings Per Common Share: $0.51, consistent with the previous year, indicating stable earnings per share.
  • Diluted Earnings Per Common Share: $0.51, unchanged from the previous year, reflecting consistent earnings performance.

Business Highlights

  • Revenue Segments: The company operates primarily in the banking sector, providing a broad range of financial services to local small and mid-sized businesses, service professionals, and individuals. The revenue is primarily generated through interest income from loans and investment securities.
  • Geographical Performance: BayCom Corp operates 35 full-service banking branches across multiple states, including 16 locations in California, one in Nevada, two in Washington, five in New Mexico, and 11 in Colorado. This geographical distribution supports a diverse customer base and mitigates regional economic risks.
  • Sales Units: The company reported a total loan portfolio of $1.97 billion as of March 31, 2025, with commercial real estate loans making up the largest segment at $1.68 billion. This indicates a strong focus on commercial real estate lending.
  • Future Outlook: The company is evaluating the impact of recent accounting guidance updates, such as the improvements to income tax disclosures and business combinations, which are expected to be implemented in the coming years. These updates are not anticipated to have a material effect on the company's financial statements but may influence operational reporting and compliance.

SEC Filing: BayCom Corp [ BCML ] - 10-Q - May. 09, 2025

data.title: Affirm Holdings Is Maintained at Overweight by JP Morgan
